channel.title: dateandtime.live News & Editorial
channel.description: Latest news on time zones, DST, calendars, holidays, and astronomy.

item.title: British Columbia Adopts Permanent Daylight Saving Time
item.description: British Columbia has adopted Permanent Daylight Saving Time. The clock change on March 8, 2026 will be the province's final seasonal time shift.

item.title: Friday the 13th: Where the Superstition Comes From
item.description: Why is Friday the 13th considered unlucky? The superstition has roots in Norse mythology, Christianity, and a famous 19th-century novel. Plus: when are the next ones?

item.title: Perseid Meteor Shower 2026: When and How to Watch
item.description: The 2026 Perseid meteor shower peaks on the night of August 12-13. With up to 100 meteors per hour expected, it's one of the best sky shows of the year.

item.title: Summer Solstice 2026: When Is the Longest Day of the Year?
item.description: The 2026 summer solstice falls on Sunday, June 21, at 04:24 UTC. It marks the longest day in the Northern Hemisphere and the start of astronomical summer.

item.title: Vietnam Adds New Public Holiday on November 24
item.description: Vietnam is set to add a new paid public holiday on November 24 to promote culture and heritage as the country undergoes rapid economic growth.
